[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000101 2
1 0110010 3
2 1100101 4
3 1110100 4
4 0011110 4
5 1100101 4
6 0110010 3
7 1100101 4

12 21 0000101 2 match 0
23 32 0000000 a
34 43 0100000 1

56 65 0000010 1
67 76 0100000 1
70 07 1100000 2

02 20 0000000 a

24 42 0000101 2 match 0

57 75 0000000 a

50 05 0000010 1

72 27 0000000 a
